samples.text: All ants are insects. All insects are animals. Are ants animals?
Every member of ants is among insects. Every member of insects is among animals. Does it follow that ants are animals?
All worker ants are arthropods. All arthropods are animals. Are worker ants animals?
animals include all insects. insects include all ants. Therefore, are ants animals?
All ants are insects. All insects are animals. A blue car is parked outside. Are ants animals?
